title: Genetics and genomics of alcohol sensitivity.
author: Morozova TV Mackay TF Anholt RR
content: S-EPMC4037586 PMC4037586 Genetics and genomics of alcohol sensitivity. Alcohol abuse and alcoholism incur a heavy socioeconomic cost in many countries. Both genetic and environmental factors contribute to variation in the inebriating effects of alcohol and alcohol addiction among individuals within
